segment.source: Renders an interactive gallery: a large featured image with lightbox zoom above a thumbnail grid in two to four columns; clicking a thumbnail swaps the featured image and its caption (title, description, image credit, optional link). Use it for: photo collections — event photos, project or portfolio shots, facility tours, product imagery. Prefer 'Images Only' for a simple static image grid, 'Content Carousel' for rotating slides, and 'Product Gallery Buy Panel' on product detail pages.
